primary_text:
A friend told me about Best for Pet after I mentioned I had been putting off my dog's dental check.

"Just sign up," she said. "It is $50 a month. You walk in, you are covered."

She was right. Unlimited consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. I have not worried about a vet bill since.

Not insurance. No claims, no excess.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: My friend told me to just sign up.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
